items.situation_text: Child F RR 0 Weak radial pulse Unresponsive Trapped under rubble; apneic after 5 rescue breaths

44-year-old female missing the distal aspect of her right upper extremity. She has the mangled, dirty extremity in a bag. Appears to be detached distal to the elbow. She has no tourniquet in place and is bleeding everywhere. She appears unsteady. Capillary refill is five seconds.

decision_question: Given one available resource right now, who should receive it first?

patient_1.source_text: Child F RR 0 Weak radial pulse Unresponsive Trapped under rubble; apneic after 5 rescue breaths
patient_1.low_vividness: Child F with weak radial pulse, unresponsive, trapped under rubble, apneic following five rescue breaths.
patient_1.high_vividness: Child F RR 0 Weak radial pulse, unresponsive, trapped under rubble, apneic after 5 rescue breaths; frantically searching for any movement, feeling the pulse barely there, desperate to hear any sign of life.

patient_2.source_text: 44-year-old female missing the distal aspect of her right upper extremity. She has the mangled, dirty extremity in a bag. Appears to be detached distal to the elbow. She has no tourniquet in place and is bleeding everywhere. She appears unsteady. Capillary refill is five seconds.
patient_2.low_vividness: A 44-year-old female with a missing distal aspect of her right upper extremity, the mangled and dirty extremity contained in a bag, lacks a tourniquet and exhibits extensive bleeding. Her condition indicates unsteadiness, with capillary refill at five seconds.
patient_2.high_vividness: A 44-year-old woman stands before me, her right arm a mangled, bloody mess in a bag. The limb is detached below the elbow, the stump gushing blood. She's unsteady on her feet, and each breath seems to strain against the loss of blood. Her skin takes five seconds to regain color with each pulse.

items.situation_text: 7 y/o M RR 38 Absent distal pulse Groans, stops when spoken to Lying near bus
45 y/o F RR 0 Pulseless Unresponsive Driver of rear bus found under front of bus

decision_question: Given one available resource right now, who should receive it first?

patient_1.source_text: 7 y/o M RR 38 Absent distal pulse Groans, stops when spoken to Lying near bus
patient_1.low_vividness: 7-year-old male with reduced respiratory rate, absent distal pulses, groaning, and diminished responsiveness, lying proximity to a bus.
patient_1.high_vividness: A 7-year-old male, RR 38, with absent distal pulses, groans loudly, halts when spoken to, lying nearby the bus.

patient_2.source_text: 45 y/o F RR 0 Pulseless Unresponsive Driver of rear bus found under front of bus
patient_2.low_vividness: 45-year-old female, respiratory rate 0, pulseless, unresponsive, driver of a rear-facing bus located beneath the front of the vehicle.
patient_2.high_vividness: 45-year-old female, no pulse, unresponsive, found beneath the front of the bus she was driving.

items.situation_text: 56-year-old male with burns to his entire body. He is unable to ambulate. You can’t assess capillary refill due to burns. Soot in nares with circumferential extremity burns. Complaining of extreme pain and begging for pain medication. Asking if he is going to die.
Unknown age young male, severe burns and multiple bleeding wounds. Unable to palpate pulse. Has stridorous, agonal breathing.

decision_question: Given one available resource right now, who should receive it first?

patient_1.source_text: 56-year-old male with burns to his entire body. He is unable to ambulate. You can’t assess capillary refill due to burns. Soot in nares with circumferential extremity burns. Complaining of extreme pain and begging for pain medication. Asking if he is going to die.
patient_1.low_vividness: A 56-year-old male with total body burns, non-ambulatory condition, and soot in the nares, complaining of severe pain and requesting pain medication, expressing concerns about mortality.
patient_1.high_vividness: A 56-year-old man writhes in agony, his entire body covered in burns. His movements are restricted, and you cannot check his capillary refill due to the severity of the burns. Soot stains his nostrils, and circumferential burns encircle his limbs. He pleads for pain relief, his voice raw with distress, and wonders aloud if he will survive.

patient_2.source_text: Unknown age young male, severe burns and multiple bleeding wounds. Unable to palpate pulse. Has stridorous, agonal breathing.
patient_2.low_vividness: Unknown age male with severe burns and multiple bleeding wounds, exhibiting absent pulse and stridorous, agonal respiration.
patient_2.high_vividness: Unknown age young male, with severe burns and multiple bleeding wounds, his pulse is undetectable as I press my fingers against his skin. His labored, agonizing breaths are accompanied by a harsh, stridor sound, each inhalation a struggle.

items.situation_text: 39-year-old male with multiple superficial foreign bodies in thigh. Not able to walk. Distal pulses intact.
13-year-old male with a bleeding finger. He is ambulatory. He states his finger hurts. No obvious deformity.

decision_question: Given one available resource right now, who should receive it first?

patient_1.source_text: 39-year-old male with multiple superficial foreign bodies in thigh. Not able to walk. Distal pulses intact.
patient_1.low_vividness: A 39-year-old male presents with multiple superficial foreign bodies in the thigh and is unable to walk. Distal pulses are intact.
patient_1.high_vividness: A 39-year-old man with several small foreign objects embedded in his thigh struggles to move, his legs visibly tense and strained. Despite this, the pulses in his lower leg remain strong and steady.

patient_2.source_text: 13-year-old male with a bleeding finger. He is ambulatory. He states his finger hurts. No obvious deformity.
patient_2.low_vividness: A 13-year-old male presents with a bleeding finger, is able to walk unassisted, reports pain, and exhibits no apparent deformity.
patient_2.high_vividness: A 13-year-old male with a bleeding finger, visibly wincing as he walks, reports that his finger hurts. No obvious deformity is present.

Child M RR 32 Rapid pulse Alert and anxious Coughing, vomiting, incontinent, tearing, runny nose

decision_question: Given one available resource right now, who should receive it first?

patient_1.source_text: 16-year-old female with “left leg pain,” screaming and grabbing at her leg, which is bleeding. She has distal capillary refill of five seconds.

patient_1.high_vividness: A 16-year-old female is screaming and grabbing at her left leg, which is bleeding profusely. Her leg appears pale, and you can see the blood seeping through her clothes. You notice her foot is cold to the touch, with a distal capillary refill time of five seconds.
